docstring: Reverse a UTF-8 string while respecting user-perceived characters (grapheme clusters).
original_string:
# frozen_string_literal: true

def reverse_utf8(str)
  str.to_s.scan(/\X/u).reverse.join
end

docstring: Parse a JSON document from a string and return a Ruby Hash.
original_string:
require 'json'

def parse_json_document(text)
  JSON.parse(text.to_s, symbolize_names: true)
end
